title: Neapolitan Mushrooms
body: Mushroom blocks all use the same "mushroom_block_inside" texture. This pack adds two new textures for more coloured building blocks. Brown Mushroom Blocks use the default texture. Red Mushroom Blocks have a red tinted inside similar in colour to Copper Blocks. Mushroom Stem Blocks have a brighter inside colour that's closer to Sandstone.
